title: GameStop Q2 Earnings Preview: Analyst Estimates, Return To Profitability In Focus
text: GameStop Q2 2024 Earnings Preview. According to Benzinga Pro data, analysts projected GameStop would report Q2 revenue of approximately $895.7 million, representing a decline from the $1.16 billion reported in the prior-year quarter. For earnings per share, the consensus estimate anticipated a loss of nine cents, worsening from a three-cent loss in Q2 2023. The article notes that GameStop had missed analyst estimates for revenue in three straight quarters and six of the last 10 quarters overall. Similarly, the company had missed analyst estimates for earnings per share in two straight quarters and six of the last 10 quarters overall. The earnings report was scheduled for after-market close on Tuesday. Notably, the company had posted a 12-cent loss in Q1 2024, breaking a streak of profitability that included 22 cents per share in Q4 2023. As of the articles publication, GameStop shares were trading at $24.58, up 2.76%, within a 52-week range of $9.95 to $64.83.
